title: Huawei SFP-25G-SR-eKit, SFP28 optical module, Multi-Mode, 100m, 25G, LC
category: Huawei / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP28
description: Huawei SFP-25G-SR-eKit is a multi-mode SFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 25Gbps , 850nm wavelength and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 100m (OM4, RS-FEC). The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP28 For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 25 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,1 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 8,4 up to 2,4 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 10,3 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
